review_title: A great fit and trusted partner
description: It is really fast to get up and running and make your apps available to users. Intuitive admin interface allows us to manage resources at a fraction of time and cost compared to other cloud providers, where you often need dedicated resources just for admin tasks.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: For a user of cloud services there's plenty of choices today. For us, we wanted a reliable tech product and a great team behind it who we know has got our back. I really like a la carte menu (pick your lego blocks) and transparent consumption-based pricing. Their customer support team is truly amazing. They never leave your hanging and promptly address all your questions.
cons: So far so good. Their team is working on introducing additional capabilities.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We have had a much better experience working with the team at American Cloud than any other service provider in the industry, and we have tried most of them.
author: Mark H.
pros: We deeply appreciate the phenomenal customer support and cutting edge technical capabilities provided to our team by American Cloud. Thanks to the American Cloud offering, we are now able to offer enhanced capabilities to our customers that were not previously possible, specifically regarding VLAN management, VPN access, and automated backups.
cons: American Cloud does not yet have as many Points of Presence (POPs) as some of their competitors, however they have been adding additional locations and we haven't noticed any measurable performance delays due to this restriction.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Our fees on AWS got a little crazy on a project, knew the AC guys personally and moved a few projects to them to start and now we use them for all of our storage.
cons: Still just newer but releasing upgrades like crazy.

review_title: Non-cancellable, Secure, Efficient, Superb Cloud Services
description: Fabulous experience with a team that values MY priorities and is genuinely non-cancellable and support my rights as a user.
author: John S.
pros: World leading support team. Tremendous pre-implementation staff. Truly non-cancellable services. And right in the heart of Silicon Valley.
cons: Would love to see a fully integrated Cloudflare-esque set of services in 2024-2025.

description: Mi sono trovata bene e un ottimo software di cloud , a molta sicurezza crittografica nella sicurezza dati e rete
author: Valentina B.
pros: Mi piace la sicurezza che la piattaforma dimostra , per poter proteggere i dati dei clienti
cons: Co vorrebbe piu facilita nella piattaforma, ma niente altro da dire buon software
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: High end service for an amazing price
description: Came on early and glad we did, continue to build new client projects here.
author: Anthony D.
pros: Ability to auto scale and keep costs low is incredible and continues to be for new projects our clients release.
cons: When I started they were still just getting started but everything you could need is in there now.

review_title: Cloud Provider that is a real Partner
author: Aron W.
pros: Customer service was better than any other provider I've dealt with in the past
cons: They are still new, I was shocked to see how many features they already have.

review_title: Sending all of our clients to American Cloud!
author: Alyssa K.
pros: Easy to integrate, super affordable, completely transparent cloud service provider!
cons: none, we really haven't run into any issues with American Cloud since making the switch

author: Tyler S.
pros: The free speech policy and also the tech
cons: The price is a little high but it’s worth it for what you get
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Immense cost savings without sacrificing quality
description: Our internal team needs lots of health data storage thats compliant and secured.
author: Jeb A.
pros: Pricing and the reliability, not hard to use and the team all loves it.
cons: Still rolling out new products, which were excited to deploy with.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
